signal.DonateFlow__credit-or-debit-card.source_description: When entering payment card details for a donation, this heading indicates the section for credit or debit cards.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-instruction.source_description: When entering payment card details for a donation, these instructions explain how to use the entry form and how payment information is protected.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-card-number.source_description: When entering payment card details for a donation, this label is for the credit card account number input box.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-expiration-.source_description: When entering payment card details for a donation, this label is for the credit card expiration date input box.

When entering payment card expiration date, this is the placeholder value in the date input box when it is empty. Please specify a value which would be reasonable to see in a payment or checkout form. The format is Month/Year to match the global credit card expiration date format. The localized value is suggested to contain 2 characters for month and 2 characters for year. In CJK languages single characters are acceptable for month and year e.g. 月 and 年. Month and year should be separated by a forward slash (/) because after the user begins typing the date, the app will automatically separate them with a slash.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-title-donat.source_description: Title above the payment card entry form after selecting a donation amount. Amount includes the currency symbol and is formatted in the locale's standard format. Examples: Donate $10; Donate ¥1000; Donate €10

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-error-inval.source_description: When entering payment card details, this error appears when the card number was entered incorrectly.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-error-expir.source_description: When entering payment card expiration date, this error appears when the card has expired.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-error-year-.source_description: When entering payment card expiration date, this error appears when year was not entered but the user changed focus from the input box.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-error-inval.source_description: When entering payment card details, this error appears when validation fails but we do not have a specific string for the failure case. For example, a card expiration date was mistyped with non-numeric digits.

signal.DonateFlow__card-form-error-cvc-t.source_description: When entering payment card CVC/CVV code, this error appears when the code entered did not include all digits in the CVC/CVV code.

signal.DonateFlow__one-time-donation-boo.source_description: Info text above the payment card entry form when making a one time donation. Explains the in-app badge which you can receive after donating.

signal.DonateFlow__custom-amount-below-m.source_description: Error text next to input box when selecting a donation amount and the user has entered a custom amount below the minimum allowed amount. Minimum amount text includes the currency symbol and is formatted in the locale's standard format. Examples: $3; ¥300; €3

Tooltip for a disabled continue button when selecting a donation amount, when the user has entered a custom amount below the minimum allowed donation amount. Minimum amount text includes the currency symbol and is formatted in the locale's standard format. Examples: $3; ¥300; €3

signal.DonateFlow__custom-amount-above-m.source_description: Error text next to input box when selecting a donation amount and the user has entered a custom amount greater than the maximum allowed amount. Maximum amount text includes the currency symbol and is formatted in the locale's standard format. Examples: $999999.99; ¥99999999; €999999.99

signal.DonateFlow__discard-dialog-body.source_description: While making a donation and after entering payment details, if you try to navigate away then a dialog shows with this body text.

signal.DonateFlow__discard-dialog-remove.source_description: While making a donation and after entering payment details, if you try to navigate away then a dialog shows and its primary button has this text to confirm cancellation of the donation.

signal.DonateFlow__discard-paypal-dialog.source_description: While making a donation and after selecting Paypal, if you try to navigate away then a dialog shows with this body text.
While making a donation and after selecting PayPal, if you try to navigate away then a dialog shows and its primary button has this text to confirm cancellation of the donation.

While making a donation and after selecting PayPal, if you try to navigate away then a dialog shows and its secondary button has this text. The user will remain on the page and they can complete a donation as previously intended.

signal.DonateFlow__continue.source_description: While making a donation and selecting the donation amount, this is the primary button to move to the next step.
